ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, all fields legible. Original certificate issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce.

invoice.quality_notes: Clear text-based PDF, 20 pages, all fields legible. Issued by SKF Eurotrade AB.

lc_check.motivation: No Letter of Credit reference found in the certificate. The certificate number SEG-26D-447768 does not contain an LC bank term reference. Standard verification applies.

locations_found: Invoice page 1: header 'SKF Eurotrade AB' and 'Issued by: SKF Eurotrade AB'
Invoice page 1: footer 'Issued by: SKF Eurotrade AB'
Invoice pages 2-20: repeated in header and footer as 'SKF Eurotrade AB'
Invoice page 20: 'SKF Eurotrade AB' in Certificate of Guarantee text
consignor_search_step2b.notes: Certificate consignor 'SKF Eurotrade' matches invoice issuer 'SKF Eurotrade AB' after normalization (AB is a legal entity suffix).

pairing_validation.motivation: Certificate references invoice 8500028962, which matches the invoice number in the invoice file. Certificate consignor 'SKF Eurotrade' matches invoice issuer 'SKF Eurotrade AB'. Certificate consignee 'Intertrade and Service LLP' matches invoice Bill to/Sold to/Ship to 'Intertrade and Service LLP'. All three criteria satisfied.

candidates.normalized_text: Austria, Bulgaria, China, Czech Republic, France, India, Italy, Japan, Malaysia, Slovakia

candidates.raw_text: BELTS (OTHER BELTS, TIMING BELTS, RUBBER BELTS), ROLLER CHAINS, BALL BRG, DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG, SELF-ALIGNING BALL BRG, NEEDLE ROLLER BRG, HOUSING INCL BRG, HOUSING EXCL BRG

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice files
comparison_steps.details: Certificate consignor 'SKF Eurotrade' is found as 'SKF Eurotrade AB' in the invoice header (Issued by), footer, and throughout all 20 pages of the invoice. The name 'SKF Eurotrade' is an exact substring of 'SKF Eurotrade AB' after removing the legal entity suffix 'AB'.
The only difference between 'SKF Eurotrade' and 'SKF Eurotrade AB' is the legal entity suffix 'AB'. Per rule 4.1.3.6, this is an accepted variation. Core name 'SKF Eurotrade' is identical.
Certificate: Sweden. Invoice: Sweden (in issuer address block). Exact match.

rules_applied.rule_description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found in invoice
Legal entity suffix AB omitted in certificate

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'SKF Eurotrade' at '415 50, GÖTEBORG, Sweden'. Invoice issuer: 'SKF Eurotrade AB' at '415 50 Goteborg, Sweden'. The name difference is solely the omission of the legal entity suffix 'AB' in the certificate. Per rule 4.1.3.6, this is an accepted variation. Address normalization: GÖTEBORG/Goteborg is case/accent variation. Country: Sweden/Sweden exact match. Result: MATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Intertrade and Service LLP, Yunusabad, Shuhrat str.15A, 100084 Tashkent, UZBEKISTAN
checkpoints.invoice_value: Intertrade and Service LLP, Yunusabad, Shuhrat str.15A, 100084 Tashkent, Uzbekistan

comparison_steps.description: Identify consignee in invoice Bill to field
comparison_steps.details: Invoice Bill to: 'Intertrade and Service LLP, Yunusabad, Shuhrat str.15A, 100084 Tashkent, Uzbekistan'. Certificate consignee: 'Intertrade and Service LLP, Yunusabad, Shuhrat str.15A, 100084 Tashkent, UZBEKISTAN'. Company name is identical. Address is identical after normalization.
Certificate: UZBEKISTAN. Invoice: Uzbekistan. Exact match after case normalization.

rules_applied.rule_description: Consignee identified in Bill to field (primary billing field)

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Intertrade and Service LLP' at 'Yunusabad, Shuhrat str.15A, 100084 Tashkent, UZBEKISTAN'. Invoice Bill to: 'Intertrade and Service LLP' at 'Yunusabad, Shuhrat str.15A, 100084 Tashkent, Uzbekistan'. Company name exactly identical. Address exactly identical. Country: UZBEKISTAN vs Uzbekistan – case normalization only. MATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Belts, roller chains, bearings refer to the inv 8500028962 dated: 02.02.2026
checkpoints.invoice_value: Invoice 8500028962 dated 02.02.2026 contains: OTHER BELTS, TIMING BELTS, RUBBER BELTS, ROLLER CHAINS, BALL BRG, DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG, SELF-ALIGNING BALL BRG, NEEDLE ROLLER BRG, HOUSING INCL BRG, HOUSING EXCL BRG

comparison_steps.description: Certificate uses general goods description with explicit invoice reference
comparison_steps.details: Certificate states: 'Belts, roller chains, bearings refer to the inv 8500028962 dated: 02.02.2026'. This constitutes a general goods description with explicit reference to the invoice. The invoice number 8500028962 matches exactly. The invoice date 02.02.2026 matches exactly. The phrase 'refer to the inv' constitutes an explicit reference to the invoice per rule 4.3.5. The invoice contains belts (OTHER BELTS, TIMING BELTS, RUBBER BELTS), roller chains (ROLLER CHAINS), and bearings (BALL BRG, DEEP GROOVE BALL BRG, SELF-ALIGNING BALL BRG, NEEDLE ROLLER BRG) – the invoice content is consistent with the certificate's general description. The invoice also contains HOUSING items, but per rule 2.1 (ensidig verifiering), the certificate's goods description need only be identifiable in the invoice, not the other way around. Bearings and housings are closely related bearing products.

rules_applied.rule_description: General goods description with explicit invoice reference – invoice number and date match, content is consistent
Unilateral verification – additional items in invoice (housings) do not cause MISMATCH

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate uses generalized description 'Belts, roller chains, bearings' with explicit reference 'refer to the inv 8500028962 dated: 02.02.2026'. Invoice number: 8500028962 – exact match. Invoice date: 02.02.2026 – exact match. The invoice contains belts, roller chains and bearings confirming consistency. Rule 4.3.5 is satisfied. No article numbers in the certificate to verify via Priority 1. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: MISMATCH because certificate mentions 'bearings' but invoice also has 'HOUSING' items
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 2.1, verification is unilateral. The certificate's description needs to be identifiable in the invoice. The invoice contains all items mentioned in the certificate (belts, roller chains, bearings). Additional items in the invoice (housings) do not in themselves cause MISMATCH.

checkpoints.certificate_value: GW in KGS: 421,80 / NETW in KGS: 364,19
checkpoints.invoice_value: Total Gross Weight 421,800 KG / Total Net Weight 364,193 KG

comparison_steps.details: Box 7 contains: GW in KGS: 421,80 and NETW in KGS: 364,19. These are the verification-basis quantities. Both GW and NW are stated with weight category and unit.

Certificate: GW in KGS 421,80 (=421.80 KG). Invoice page 20: Total Gross Weight 421,800 KG (=421.800 KG). Per rule 4.4.3 (trunkering av decimaler): certificate value 421.80 is the truncation of 421.800 to 2 decimal places. 421.800 truncated to 2 decimals = 421.80. MATCH.

Certificate: NETW in KGS 364,19 (=364.19 KG). Invoice page 20: Total Net Weight 364,193 KG (=364.193 KG). Per rule 4.4.3 (trunkering av decimaler): certificate value 364.19 is the truncation of 364.193 to 2 decimal places. 364.193 truncated to 2 decimals = 364.19. MATCH.

rules_applied.rule_description: Box 7 quantities are verification-basis: GW and NW both stated
Weight categories GW and NW explicitly stated in certificate with unit KGS
Total weight in invoice verified against certificate weight

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: GW in KGS: 421,80 and NETW in KGS: 364,19. Invoice page 20 transport details: Total Gross Weight 421,800 KG and Total Net Weight 364,193 KG. GW check: 421.80 vs 421.800 – truncation of 421.800 to 2 decimals gives 421.80. NW check: 364.19 vs 364.193 – truncation of 364.193 to 2 decimals gives 364.19. Both match via allowed decimal truncation per rule 4.4.3. No contradiction between certificate and invoice values. Both GW and NW verified. MATCH.

rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.4.3, truncation of decimals is allowed normalization. 421.800 truncated to 2 decimal places = 421.80. This is an exact truncation match.

checkpoints.certificate_value: Austria, Bulgaria, China, Czech Republic, France, India, Italy, Japan, Malaysia, Slovakia
checkpoints.invoice_value: Austria (AT), Bulgaria (BG), China (CN), Czech Republic (CZ), France (FR), India (IN), Italy (IT), Japan (JP), Malaysia (MY), Slovakia (SK)

comparison_steps.description: Identify all origin countries in invoice
comparison_steps.details: Invoice uses 'Country of manufacturing' column on pages 1-2 and per-line country codes on pages 5-19. Countries found: Austria (AT), Bulgaria (BG), China (CN), Czech Republic (CZ), France (FR), India (IN), Italy (IT), Japan (JP), Malaysia (MY), Slovakia (SK).

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.5 Verify each certificate origin in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Check each of the 10 origin countries from certificate against invoice
comparison_steps.details: Austria: found in invoice (AT, pages 1, 14, 18). Bulgaria: found (BG, pages 1, 12, 14-17). China: found (CN, pages 1, 5-8, 11, 19). Czech Republic: found (CZ, page 12). France: found (FR, pages 2, 12-13, 18-19). India: found (IN, page 8). Italy: found (IT, pages 2, 8-18). Japan: found (JP, pages 8-12). Malaysia: found (MY, page 19). Slovakia: found (SK, page 19). All 10 countries in the certificate are present in the invoice.

comparison_steps.description: Check if invoice contains any origin countries NOT in certificate
comparison_steps.details: Invoice countries: AT, BG, CN, CZ, FR, IN, IT, JP, MY, SK. Certificate countries: Austria, Bulgaria, China, Czech Republic, France, India, Italy, Japan, Malaysia, Slovakia. These are identical sets. No additional origin countries in the invoice that are absent from the certificate.

rules_applied.rule_description: Origin countries identified in 'Country of manufacturing' field in invoice
Normalization of country names – full names vs ISO codes (AT=Austria, BG=Bulgaria, CN=China, CZ=Czech Republic, FR=France, IN=India, IT=Italy, JP=Japan, MY=Malaysia, SK=Slovakia)
Positive verification – every origin in certificate identified in invoice

checkpoints.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: Austria, Bulgaria, China, Czech Republic, France, India, Italy, Japan, Malaysia, Slovakia (10 countries). Invoice 'Country of manufacturing' column lists items under Austria, Bulgaria, China, Czech Republic, France, India, Italy, Japan, Malaysia, Slovakia. Also confirmed via per-line country codes: AT, BG, CN, CZ, FR, IN, IT, JP, MY, SK. All 10 certificate origin countries are explicitly present in the invoice. No additional non-matching origins in the invoice. MATCH.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Samtliga kontrollpunkter överensstämmer mellan certifikatet och fakturan. Avsändaren SKF Eurotrade identifieras i fakturan, mottagaren Intertrade and Service LLP är identisk, varubeskrivningen 'belts, roller chains, bearings' stöds av korrekt fakturareferens och datum, vikterna stämmer efter decimaltrunkering, och alla tio ursprungsländer (Österrike, Bulgarien, Kina, Tjeckien, Frankrike, Indien, Italien, Japan, Malaysia, Slovakien) kan verifieras i fakturan. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.consolidation_notes: All 5 checkpoints returned MATCH. No MISMATCH or MANUAL_REVIEW on any checkpoint. Minimum confidence across checkpoints is 0.95 (goods description), well above the 0.85 threshold. Overall result: IDENTICAL.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.rule_applied: Juridisk bolagsformsförkortning – AB är en tillåten variation av företagssuffix
sections.motivation: Certifikatets avsändare 'SKF Eurotrade' identifieras i fakturans utställarfält som 'SKF Eurotrade AB'. Skillnaden är enbart den juridiska bolagsformen AB. Land: Sweden i båda dokument. MATCH.

sections.invoice_value: Intertrade and Service LLP, Yunusabad, Shuhrat str.15A, 100084 Tashkent, Uzbekistan

Fakturanumret och datumet matchar exakt. Fakturans varuinnehåll (remmar, rullkedjor, lager) är förenligt med certifikatets beskrivning. MATCH.

sections.invoice_value: Total Gross Weight 421,800 KG / Total Net Weight 364,193 KG

sections.motivation: Certifikatets bruttovikt 421,80 KGS matchar fakturans Total Gross Weight 421,800 KG (trunkering av 3:e decimal). Certifikatets nettovikt 364,19 KGS matchar fakturans Total Net Weight 364,193 KG (trunkering av 3:e decimal). Båda viktkategorierna (GW och NW) verifierade. MATCH.

output_quality_checks.notes: All 5 checkpoints MATCH. comparison_result=IDENTICAL is consistent. workflow_recommendation=AUTO_APPROVAL_ELIGIBLE is consistent with IDENTICAL. All confidence values ≥ 0.85. No inconsistencies detected.
